Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given an event log with three cases Lets summarize the observed traces sequences of activities for each case Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Observations All cases start with Receive Application RA and end with Archive Case AC After RA we always have Validate Form VF and then Assess Eligibility AE In cases 1 and 3 after AE there is a loop involving Request Missing Info RMI and Validate Form VF again

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We see that after AE we have an optional segment that consists of one or more RMIs followed by exactly one VF In case 1 that segment is RMI VF In case 3 that segment is RMI RMI VF In case 2 that segment is absent

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: So we can think of the loop as first we do AE which is part of the main sequence before the loop then we might have a loop that consists of RMI and VF repeated

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Maybe the loop should be RMIVF repeated That would give RMI VF RMI VF for two repetitions but in case 3 we have RMI RMI VF That does not work

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can model that block as sequence of loop on RMI and then VF namely sequence of loop RMI tau followed by VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If we set A equal to RMI and B equal to tau then after each RMI we either exit or do tau and then another RMI So this gives one or more RMIs Then after the loop we do VF

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Because in case 2 we do not have any RMI we need to make the entire block optional We can use an XOR with tau namely X of sequence of loop RMI tau and VF or tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In case 1 the loop gives one RMI and then VF so the trace becomes RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC In case 3 the loop gives two RMIs and then VF so the trace becomes RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC In case 2 we take the tau branch so the trace becomes RA VF AE AD SC AC That matches

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the process tree can be represented as sequence RA VF AE XOR of sequence of loop RMI tau and VF or tau then AD SC AC
